name: Vertical Datum Reference
abstract: Reusable schema component encoding the vertical datum metadata required for unambiguous height referencing across land and marine domains, as mandated by FMSDI Best Practice 1 (Unified Geospatial Reference). Records datum name, epoch, CRS identifier, separation surface model, transformation method, vertical orientation convention, and vertical accuracy.

sources.title: IHO S-100 Universal Hydrographic Data Model
